% GENERATED from style/brand.json by style/generate_style.py -- do not edit by hand.
% Assumes xcolor is already loaded by the document/class.
\definecolor{brandAccent}{HTML}{6AF0AD}
\definecolor{brandAccentStrong}{HTML}{2AD488}
\definecolor{brandAccentSoft}{HTML}{E9FBF2}
\definecolor{brandAccentDeep}{HTML}{145A3C}
\definecolor{brandTextMain}{HTML}{1F2A24}
\definecolor{brandLink}{HTML}{0E7490}
% Light/print syntax palette for LaTeX `listings` blocks -- the same
% values the generated pygments-print theme gives pandoc code blocks,
% so hand-written listings and pandoc-rendered code match in the book.
\definecolor{brandSyntaxComment}{HTML}{6A737D}
\definecolor{brandSyntaxKeyword}{HTML}{D73A49}
\definecolor{brandSyntaxString}{HTML}{032F62}
\definecolor{brandSyntaxLineNumber}{HTML}{6A737D}
% Backwards-compatible aliases used across the documents:
\colorlet{greenAccent}{brandAccent}
\colorlet{myGreenAccent}{brandAccent}
\colorlet{basecolor}{brandAccent}
\colorlet{linkcolor}{brandLink}
